subcodes.first_line: O Rustam! Thy namesake became renowned throughout the horizons for physical prowess, whilst thou art known throughout the world for spiritual valor and nobility of soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم همنامت بشجاعت تن شهیر آفاق گشت تو بمردانگی و آزادگی جان در جهان معروف
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @courage, @soul; spirit after death, @the human soul
